name: Dust Devil
short_description: Dust Devil is a coffee-break super hardcore minigame. With only one mouse button and your hyper bike you will overthrow a corrupt regime! Race from town squares to skyscraper rooftops in under 5 minutes. Help people on the streets and outspeed riot cops. Catch Prime Minister before he runs away!
detailed_description:
DUST DEVIL

Super hardcore coffee-break arcade.


In the middle of street riots, you dodge motor officers, lasers, orbital beams and break cell mufflers on your hyper bike. The game is super fast and difficult: it has time limit and just a few checkpoints on your way to boss fights. With just one mouse button you control a swarm of bikers or a single agile rider. Your skills and tactics are that matters on each level.

No grind, no character progression, just never stopping action.

Ready, Steady, Go!

  • 5 minutes to (beat the game) overthrow the government
  • Minimalistic controls
  • 14 levels from street riots to corporate rooftops
  • 2 boss fights, no hitpoints
  • Drift and outmaneuver riot cops
  • Pick up duplicators to make bike swarms
  • Brutal New Game +
